entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global targets for ending hunger, food insecurity, and malnutrition by 2030

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient food for basic physical needs

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: The lack of consistent access to enough nutritious, safe, and sufficient food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Deficiencies, excesses, or imbalances in a person's intake of energy and nutrients

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the number of people in a population, driving demand for food

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting farming

entities.name: MARKET DYNAMICS
entities.description: The forces that impact the prices and behaviors of producers and consumers in agriculture

entities.name: RAINFED FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems that rely solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The responsibility to conserve natural resources and protect global ecosystems for the future

entities.name: CULTIVATED LAND
entities.description: Land used for growing crops

entities.name: LAND RESOURCES
entities.description: Natural assets including soil and water used for agricultural production

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of an ecosystem's stability, functionality, and long-term viability

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a farming system to recover quickly from external shocks

entities.name: EXTERNAL SHOCKS
entities.description: Unpredictable events that disrupt agricultural and food systems

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SPACE
entities.description: The physical area available for farming activities

entities.name: ARABLE LANDSCAPE
entities.description: Land capable of being ploughed and used to grow crops

entities.name: HORIZONTAL LAND EXPANSION
entities.description: The strategy of increasing the total area of cultivated land

entities.name: MISMANAGEMENT
entities.description: Poor or inefficient management of land and agricultural resources

entities.name: DEGRADATION OF CULTIVATED LANDSCAPES
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of agricultural land

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who manage small plots of land, often in developing regions

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with lower industrialization and lower human development indices

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of grain yield per unit of land

entities.name: LAND USE AND MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Frameworks for organizing and utilizing land to enhance production and sustainability

entities.name: FINANCING FOR FOOD SECURITY AND NUTRITION
entities.description: Monetary investments and funding mechanisms aimed at eradicating hunger

entities.name: INNOVATIVE FINANCING METHODS
entities.description: New and effective ways of tracking and providing funds for agricultural investments

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for people living in rural areas

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of grain harvested from cultivated land

entities.name: LAND MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Planned approaches to managing land for sustainability and productivity across diverse regions
